name: Yellow Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Shirley Schwaegerle
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Cream margarine until smooth, then gradually add sugar and beat until fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Add vanilla and mix until smooth and creamy. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt into a separate bowl. Measure the milk, then stir in vanilla. Gradually mix dry ingredients into the milk mixture until smooth and creamy. Pour batter evenly into two greased and floured 9-inch cake pans. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
